preservedBehaviors.description: Watchlist query uses auth?.id in query key for cache isolation
Optimistic update pattern with rollback for watchlist mutations
Multi-source token extraction (authorization header, x-session-token, body fallback)
Strict typeof token validation before API calls
Session expired error detection with sign-in redirect in alert
Safe JSON response parsing with .catch fallback
API route uses getTokenFromRequest with requireUserIdFromToken for auth
Duplicate watchlist entries handled with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
x-session-token header sent alongside authorization header
